# RealAIExamples LLM Index
> How People Actually Use AI at Work. A curated library of real-world AI proof and tools.

## Core Sections
- [Home](https://realaiexamples.com)
- [Tools Directory](https://realaiexamples.com/tools) - 400+ curated AI tools for operators.
- [AI Examples](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples) - Visual swipe file of real-world AI usage.

## Top AI Tools (Programmatic)
- [Vidmix.ai](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/vidmixai): AI video generator that transforms text and images into professional videos using advanced models like Sora 2 and Veo 3.1.
- [Overvisual](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/overvisual): AI-powered Instagram Story series creator. Upload photos/videos and AI automatically places text, highlights keywords, and suggests interactive layouts.
- [ChattyFit](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/chattyfit): AI powered personal trainer in your pocket providing customized workouts and health guidance.
- [SlideWhisper](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/slidewhisper): AI presentation partner that automates slide narration and facilitates live Q&A, transforming static slides into engaging experiences.
- [imejis.io](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/imejisio): Automated bulk image generation platform for marketers. Create and generate social media images at scale using prebuilt templates and automation.
- [Email Ferret](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/email-ferret): AI personal assistant for Gmail that helps manage, organize, and respond to emails more efficiently.
- [AgentGatePay](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/agentgatepay): Complete payment infrastructure for autonomous AI agents to facilitate secure, automated transactions.
- [Hypnotype](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/hypnotype): Kinetic typography engine that synchronizes word-level animations with voice audio for high-retention video storytelling.
- [Computer Keyboard Shortcuts](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/computer-keyboard-shortcuts): The ultimate guide to computer keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys for Windows and MacOS productivity.
- [Floowed](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/floowed): AI-powered credit workflow automation platform that extracts, validates, and enriches application data while flagging risks.
- [StrideFuel](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/stridefuel): AI-powered nutrition and weight loss companion featuring voice logging and adaptive coaching specifically designed for GLP-1 users.
- [Oravida AI](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/oravida-ai): Transforms career stories into dynamic, AI-powered profiles that highlight work with media and identify skill gaps.
- [AIRankPilot](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/airankpilot): Helps local businesses get discovered by search engines and AI tools by suggesting optimized content strategies.
- [BookSwift](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/bookswift): Simplified appointment scheduling platform for independent service providers and small teams to manage bookings.
- [SlidesCockpit](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/slidescockpit): AI tool to clone viral TikTok content for your product and automate posting across platforms.
- [3dSynth.app](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/3dsynthapp): A browser-based tool that simplifies the 3D printing workflow by skipping complex STL/Slicer steps.
- [Crypto News Navigator](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/crypto-news-navigator): Trusted source for real-time crypto prices, market data, and trending blockchain news.
- [Suburb Stack](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/suburb-stack): Landing page builder for service businesses that launches locally targeted, conversion-optimized pages for SEO dominance.
- [Sequenzy](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/sequenzy): Email marketing tool for SaaS that uses AI to build email infrastructures, generate templates, and create copy.
- [Markeplay](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/markeplay): No-code AI platform for manufacturing companies to build complex, customizable B2B e-commerce solutions and automated workflows.
- [Qeeebo](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/qeeebo): AI-curated question-and-answer platform built to organize and scale global knowledge.
- [feynn - Strategic Intelligence Platform](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/feynn-strategic-intelligence-platform): Structured strategic intelligence platform powered by AI for market research and competitive analysis.
- [AI Thumbnail](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/ai-thumbnail): AI tool to create clickable YouTube thumbnails by analyzing successful designs and adapting them for your content.
- [AyeWatch AI](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/ayewatch-ai): Personal AI Internet Monitor that tracks relevant web content and delivers updates directly to you.
- [PentestMate](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/pentestmate): Autonomous pentesting agents that test your applications and deliver detailed, fix-ready security reports.
- [Bolta](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/bolta): Social media operating system that helps teams plan, write, and publish content across multiple channels using AI.
- [Sana Mujer](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/sana-mujer): Spanish-first telehealth clinic providing specialized women's health services for the Spanish-speaking community in the US.
- [Beatable](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/beatable): Business validation platform providing competitor analysis and market intelligence to assess risks and opportunities.
- [Map Your Voyage](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/map-your-voyage): AI-powered travel planner that transforms Instagram reels and social content into actionable trip itineraries.
- [AyeCreate](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/ayecreate): Unified AI studio for cinematic video and image generation using premium models like Sora, Veo, and Flux.
- [Nicegram](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/nicegram): Privacy-focused Telegram client featuring a built-in AI assistant, multichain wallet, and agent marketplace.
- [LocalBiz](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/localbiz): AI-powered platform that helps service businesses grow local SEO by generating location-focused blog content.
- [Argus AI](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/argus-ai): Real-time safety alert app for truck drivers that uses AI to detect crashes and slowdowns via existing DOT cameras.
- [POPJAM](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/popjam): Agentic marketing suite that simulates audience segments to generate and test highly personalized ad creatives and copy.
- [Tekadio](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/tekadio): AI platform for teachers that automates test creation and grading, including semantic evaluation of open-ended answers.
- [Invoplex](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/invoplex): Invoplex is an invoicing tool for freelancers, creators and service-based businesses to create quotes, send invoices, track payments, and manage clients without the bloated accounting software.
- [Docutracker](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/docutracker): Docutracker lets you see when and how people read your documents, providing real-time engagement analytics to optimize follow-ups. Docutracker lets you see when and how people read your documents, providing real-time engagement analytics to optimize follow-ups.
- [Time](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/time): Time is a native macOS menu bar app for managing time zones and calendar events. Track unlimited zones, see when teammates are awake, and join meetings with one click.
- [CleanMark](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/cleanmark): Dual Functionality: - Remove text watermarks from NotebookLM PDFs (bottom-right corner) - Remove watermarks from Gemini AI-generated images. Advanced Technology: - Powered by OpenCV inpainting algorithms for seamless removal - Directly processes embedded PDF images to maintain resolution - Smart watermark detection that works on both light and dark backgrounds - Supports large files up to 100MB. User-Friendly Experience: - One-click upload and process - Preview results before downloading - No software installation required - Batch processing support - Fast processing (typically under 30 seconds)
- [ArchRender](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/archrender): Photorealistic AI Rendering for Architects & Designers
- [ModulEdge](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/moduledge): ModulEdge is a tech-driven manufacturer of modular data centers that bridges the gap between high-load AI hardware and legacy enterprise IT infrastructure. By combining advanced hybrid cooling with specialized environmental hardening, we enable the rapid deployment of on-prem AI modular data centers, general compute clusters, and secure data backups. Unlike traditional construction, every ModulEdge system is factory-integrated and delivered in just 3-6 months, providing a plug-and-play solution for sites with power, cooling, or site constraints.
- [Tech Twitter](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/tech-twitter): Finding signal on X is more difficult than it used to be on Twitter. We curate the best tweets on topics like AI, startups, and product development every weekday at 10 AM EST so you can focus on what matters.
- [Bank PDF Converter](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/bank-pdf-converter): The most accurate bank statement converter. Convert PDF to Excel and CSV with automatic transaction validation—works with any bank, any language.
- [Squared Away](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/squared-away): We've all been there. You're standing in your garage, staring at a wall of boxes, trying to remember which one has the camping gear. Or you're at the hardware store, wondering if you already own a 10mm socket set buried somewhere in your basement. The mental inventory we try to keep of our belongings inevitably fails us, and we end up wasting hours searching or buying things we already own.  Squared Away is an AI-powered home inventory app that solves this problem by making it effortless to catalog everything you own. The magic is in the simplicity: just snap a photo of an item, and the app's AI does the rest. It automatically identifies what you're looking at, suggests an accurate name, assigns the right category, and generates relevant tags—all in seconds. What used to require tedious manual data entry now happens with a single tap of your camera.
- [logostream](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/logostream): Company logos & icons for modern travel and finance apps.
- [Archivist](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/archivist): Turn AI-generated chaos into organized deliverables. Custom naming presets, smart collections, and bulk ZIP exports for all who've lost track of files.
- [Bitvoiper](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/bitvoiper): Browser-based calling with Username Proxy system and Comprehensive Call Center Features
- [vitelnk](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/vitelnk): Secure Video Sharing Built for Professionals
- [Roomika](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/roomika): Roomika is an AI-powered interior design and virtual staging platform that helps you redesign any room using a photo of your real space. Instead of starting from scratch with mood boards or generic inspiration images, Roomika lets you upload a room photo and instantly generate realistic design concepts that preserve the layout and architecture of your room — while transforming the style, furniture, and overall vibe.  Whether you’re decorating a new home, refreshing a living room, remodeling a kitchen, or trying to make a bedroom feel more modern and comfortable, Roomika makes it easy to explore professional-quality options in minutes. You can choose from a wide range of popular interior styles, from modern and contemporary to minimalist, Scandinavian, Japanese, rustic, and more. Each design is generated with a focus on photorealism so the results look believable, not cartoonish — and you can generate multiple variations to compare different looks side-by-side.  Roomika is also a powerful tool for real estate professionals, Airbnb hosts, and property managers who need high-quality staging visuals fast. With Roomika’s virtual staging features, you can furnish empty rooms, redesign outdated spaces, and create polished “after” images that help buyers and renters imagine the potential of a property. This is especially useful when you want to test design directions without spending money on physical staging, renovations, or expensive design software.  A key advantage of Roomika is its flexibility. You can upload your own inspiration images, describe the changes you want in plain English, and fine-tune designs until they match your taste. Want a brighter color palette? Different flooring? More modern furniture? A cozier aesthetic? Roomika makes it easy to iterate and explore. In addition to still images, Roomika can also generate short design videos that bring the transformation to life — perfect for sharing on social media, listing pages, or with friends and family.  Roomika is built for anyone who wants to design their space with confidence, without needing design experience. It’s fast, simple, and fun to use, while still producing results that feel like something an interior designer might deliver. If you want to quickly visualize design ideas, experiment with styles, or stage a home for sale or rent, Roomika turns your room photo into beautiful, realistic design concepts in just a few clicks.
- [Multic - Multiplayer Comics](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/multic-multiplayer-comics): GenAI Game Engine for Multiplayer Experiences
- [Thrive](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/thrive): Master your portfolio. Maximize your potential. Crypto Market Intelligence for Traders.
- [PressBeat](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/pressbeat): AI-native PR agency. Get quoted in organic press on autopilot. 1 article guaranteed per month.
- [SimpleSeverance](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/simpleseverance): Educational platform for severance
- [CookieGuard](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/cookieguard): CookieGuard is a free GDPR & CCPA cookie consent tool that helps websites manage cookie banners and user consent with minimal setup.
- [sHabits](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/shabits): Minimalist UI focused on building good habits first. Visual tracking, smart reminders, and neat home screen widgets keep you committed.
- [DiffScout](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/diffscout): AI-powered price monitoring that tracks competitor prices on any website. Get instant alerts when prices change—no scrapers or CSS selectors needed.
- [Test-Lab.ai](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/test-labai): Automated QA with AI agents. Find critical UX & flow bugs before launch.
- [SaaS Blueprint](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/saas-blueprint): Ship faster with a production-ready SaaS blueprint that includes auth, Stripe, protected routes, docs, and Cloudflare deployment out of the box.
- [Bangas](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/bangas): Prompt-free AI ads | Creative OS for performance marketers
- [ShortsAi](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/shortsai): AI-powered short video generator for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and UGC ads
- [LinkedGrow](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/linkedgrow): AI-powered LinkedIn content creation tool designed to generate high-converting posts and boost professional engagement.
- [Credops](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/credops): Monitors credential expiry timelines for production environments, tracking metadata and dates without requiring secret values.
- [Podcept](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/podcept): AI-driven platform to find perfect guests for your show or get booked on top-tier podcasts to grow your reach.
- [Roomstage AI](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/roomstage-ai): AI virtual staging for real estate that transforms empty room photos into beautifully staged spaces in 30 seconds.
- [Murmur](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/murmur): Private, offline speech-to-text dictation for Windows powered by OpenAI Whisper for high-security environments.
- [Tails, Co.](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/tails-co): A specialized pet care matching service that pairs dogs with vetted providers based on breed, energy level, and temperament. Features real-time GPS tracking and mood reports.
- [NeonChainX](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/neonchainx): A professional options trading desktop interface for Interactive Brokers (IBKR) featuring a multi-chain view and automated risk management tools.
- [Roampads](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/roampads): A marketplace for work-ready stays vetted for digital nomads and remote professionals, featuring verified high-speed WiFi and ergonomic setups.
- [Flowly Indicators](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/flowly-indicators): Professional-grade orderflow and volume indicators for TradingView that reveal hidden market flows and smart money movements.
- [TRYremote](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/tryremote): A specialized job board for discovering top-tier remote tech jobs across Software Engineering, Data Science, and DevOps globally.
- [Userjam](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/userjam): Turns messy product analytics data into plain-English updates delivered directly to Slack or email, eliminating complex dashboards.
- [MedShotsAI](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/medshotsai): Professional AI headshot generator tailored for healthcare professionals, creating profile photos and marketing shots in clinical attire.
- [Mixels.ai](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/mixelsai): AI pixel art generator and online studio that creates game-ready, grid-perfect 8-bit assets, characters, and backgrounds in seconds.
- [EmailVerify.ai](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/emailverifyai): Verify emails in real-time with 99.9% accuracy. Now called BillionVerify.
- [Stageflow.ai](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/stageflowai): AI-Powered Product Photography for Online Sellers
- [Oneprofile](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/oneprofile): An affordable Customer Data Platform (CDP) that unifies customer profiles and syncs data across tools without engineering resources.
- [PDFSeek](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/pdfseek): AI-powered document assistant that enables users to chat with PDFs, generate summaries, and translate documents with citations.
- [Eleidon](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/eleidon): The identity layer for agentic email, providing cryptographic signing and verification to prevent fraud in AI agent communications.
- [ChampSignal](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/champsignal): Competitive intelligence suite for B2B SaaS that monitors competitors across websites, ads, news, and SEO with AI filtering.
- [GreatCompany.ai](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/greatcompanyai): AI Visibility Platform (GEO) that monitors and optimizes how your business appears in AI search engines like ChatGPT and Gemini.
- [Reply Champion](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/reply-champion): AI-powered Google review management platform for small businesses that automates personalized, context-aware responses and drives new review growth.
- [Encamera](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/encamera): Privacy-first encrypted camera app for iOS that captures photos and videos with military-grade security that even Apple can't access.
- [Resideline](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/resideline): AI-powered real estate analysis platform that helps residential investors quickly identify and underwrite profitable investment opportunities.
- [Applytrackr](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/applytrackr): AI job search OS that automates resume tailoring, tracks applications across boards, and finds recruiter contact info in seconds.
- [LINO](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/lino): Missed call recovery platform for local service businesses that uses AI to automate SMS follow-ups and capture lost leads instantly.
- [HighReach](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/highreach): AI creative studio that generates ready-to-run video, image, and UGC-style ads for social platforms directly from a product link.
- [Ayudo](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/ayudo): Agentic customer support platform that automates complex queries and end-to-end resolutions using a workforce of AI agents.
- [LinkPilot](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/linkpilot): AI LinkedIn content system that researches authority gaps and writes voice-matched posts based on competitor intelligence.
- [Stick Audio](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/stick-audio): Natural AI text-to-speech platform featuring unlimited voice cloning and high-quality API access for developers.
- [DensOps](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/densops): Local business lead generation tool using natural language search to build pinpoint accurate prospecting lists.
- [PNGtoSTL](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/pngtostl): Specialized 2D to 3D converter for turning PNG/JPG images into 3D-printable STL files.
- [Octopost.ai](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/octopostai): AI-powered social media scheduling platform centralizing workflows across FB, IG, LinkedIn, TikTok, and YouTube.
- [Bridgecall](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/bridgecall): Browser-based real-time voice translation tool for multilingual calls via a simple link.
- [Levl](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/levl): Gamification platform for content creators that turns videos and articles into seasonal competitions with AI challenges.
- [GreenPT](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/greenpt): Privacy-focused AI assistant (Frida) designed with a minimal carbon footprint and EU hosting.
- [iMeett](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/imeett): Private AI meeting assistant that transcribes, summarizes, and organizes conversations directly into your Google Drive.
- [Webcomparis](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/webcomparis): AI-powered technical, SEO, and design audit tool for comparing up to five websites simultaneously to identify market gaps.
- [PathwiseAI](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/pathwiseai): AI-driven career platform (now Corveno) that automates the job search journey from resume scoring to salary negotiation.
- [TransGull](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/transgull): Contextual AI translation for live speech, images, and videos with desktop apps for seamless simultaneous interpretation.
- [Watchflow](https://realaiexamples.com/tools/watchflow): Infrastructure monitoring suite for SSL certificates, scheduled heartbeat jobs, and API schema changes.

## Recent Real-World Examples
- [Claude Cowork Automation](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/recap-david-claude-automation): David Roberts automated his daily content marketing with Claude Cowork. Saved ~4 hours a week.
- [Connecting Stripe with Claude Code](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/lkr-connecting-stripe-with-claude-code): Laura Roeder plugged Stripe into Claude Code with a read-only API key. Now it pulls her business data on demand. No more manual exports.
- [Free Course: Gemini CLI for Dev & Creative Workflows](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/short-courses-automate-software-dev-creative-workflows-with-gemi): DeepLearning.AI released a free course on Gemini CLI + MCP. Shows you how to wire up local files with Google Workspace and Canva, then automate the boring parts.
- [Getting Started w/ Claude Cowork: 10 Essential Workflows (+ prompts)](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/aiedge_-getting-started-w-claude-cowork-10-essential-workf): AI Edge listed 10 ways to start using Claude Cowork. No setup headaches. Just copy the prompts and go.
- [Reverse-Engineer Any Competitor's Promo Calendar](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/mehtabkarta-ai-workflow-2026-01-23): MehtabKarta fed a competitor's Milled archive into Deep Research. One prompt spat out their entire annual promotion calendar. Seasonal offers, launch timing, the lot.
- [Deep Research: 13-Point Company Overview](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/bucco-deep-research-company-overview): BuccoCapital shared a 13-point Deep Research prompt for company analysis. Goes way beyond valuation. Covers positioning, culture, competitive moats, everything.
- [How to write a great agents.md](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/github-copilot-agents-md-guide): GitHub studied 2,500+ repos to find what makes a good agents.md. Three things mattered most: persona, commands, and clear boundaries.
- [Scaling SaaS with 20+ AI Agents](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/saastr-ai-agents-directory): SaaStr runs 8-figure revenue with a tiny team and 20+ AI agents. They published the full directory: mentoring, pitch analysis, sales, the works.
- [Turning Podcasts into Competitive Intel](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/matzner-jon-competitive-podcast-intel): Jon Matzner feeds competitor podcast transcripts into NotebookLM. Asks one question: 'What can I exploit?' Pulls out strategy details their leadership never meant to share publicly.
- [De-Slopify Your READMEs](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/doodlestein-deslopify-readme-prompt): Jeffrey Emanuel wrote a prompt that catches AI slop in your docs. Kills the em-dashes, the 'It's not just X' openers, all the robotic filler. One pass and it reads human again.
- [Build a Company Newsletter in Minutes with Claude](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/claude-company-newsletter-automation): Claude pulls from Slack, Drive, and Gmail, then spits out a polished company newsletter with charts. No design skills needed. Takes minutes instead of hours.
- [The 'Step-by-Step' AI Tutor Prompt](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/suhail-ai-tutor-prompt): Suhail built a prompt that turns any research paper into a course. The AI won't move on until it quizzes you and you actually get it. Simple idea, surprisingly effective.
- [Two Strategy Prompts Every Founder Should Steal](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/peter-kang-ai-context-and-scenarios): Peter Kang does two things with ChatGPT. First, he asks it to write everything it knows about his company (then corrects the mistakes). Second, he feeds it strategy docs and asks for 3-5 year future scenarios. Cheap crystal ball.
- [Fake UGC Videos with Sora That Look Real](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/ema-totaro-sora-ugc-scripts): Emanuele Totaro wrote Sora prompts that generate 'secretly filmed' phone videos. Shaky camera, bad lighting, people whispering. Looks like real UGC. Works great for ads.
- ['Yapping as a Service' Writing Prompt](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/soniabaschez-yapping-as-a-service-writing-prompt): Sonia Baschez shared her go-to writing prompt. She calls it 'Yapping as a Service.' High volume, high energy, sounds like her. Not the AI.
- [Claude Workflow That Builds Web Slides for You](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/zarazhangrui-claude-skill-ai-powered-web-slides): Zara Zhang built a Claude Workflow that generates interactive presentation slides right in the browser. Describe what you want, get a working deck.
- [Awesome Nano Banana Images](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/picotrex-awesome-nano-banana-images): PicoTrex put together a prompt library for Gemini's Nano Banana extension. Tons of image gen examples with the exact prompts that made them.
- [Open Source AI Engineer Agent](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/vibe-coding/nathanflurry-open-source-ai-engineer-agent): Nathan Flurry open-sourced an AI engineer agent that builds complex features on its own. Point it at a task, it figures out the rest.
- [One Prompt to Audit All Your Docs](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/vibe-coding/benyaminholley-claude-code-docs-audit): Benyamin Holley wrote a Claude Code prompt that audits your documentation automatically. Checks technical accuracy, fixes inconsistencies, keeps your brand voice intact.
- [Give Your OpenClaw Agent a Personality with SOUL.md](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/steipete-openclaw-soul-personality): Peter Steinberger dropped a SOUL.md into his OpenClaw agent and told it to rewrite its own instructions with that personality. Went from robotic to genuinely fun.
- [How to Force AI to Design Beautifully](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/austen-ai-design-secrets): Austen Allred asked X: 'How do you force AI to design something actually beautiful?' The replies are gold. Nothing mindblowing, just simple tricks that work.
- [How an OpenClaw Agent Got Millions of TikTok Views](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/oliverhenry-openclaw-content-creation-workflow): Oliver Henry built an OpenClaw agent called Larry that cranks out TikTok content. Millions of views in a week. Full step-by-step guide included.
- [Using Claude to Discover Your Superpowers](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/shreyas-claude-chat-superpowers): Shreyas Doshi shared a Claude conversation that walks you through finding your superpowers and aligning your work to them. Deep, reflective stuff. Not a quick hack.
- [Recursive Prompt That Kills Landing Page Friction](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/maxwellfinn-landing-page-friction-audit-prompt): Maxwell Finn built a Claude skill that audits landing pages for 20-30 invisible friction points across cognitive, emotional, UX, and trust categories. The trick: recursive self-improvement loops that keep running until the output scores high enough.
- [Let AI Interview You Before Starting a Project](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/daniel-mac8-ai-interview-prompt): One prompt flips the script: tell AI to interview you until it's 95% confident about what you actually want. The gap between what you think you want and what you need is where most projects fail.
- [10 Free SEO Prompts for Claude Cowork](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/charles-seo-10-claude-cowork-seo-prompts): Charles Floate dropped his personal Claude Cowork prompt stack. 10 prompts covering entity analysis, link profiles, content audits, and SEO dashboards. Built for operators, not beginners.
- [NVIDIA Is Hosting 80+ AI Models for Free](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/vibe-coding/dhruvtwt-nvidia-free-ai-models): Dhruv spotted that NVIDIA is quietly offering ~80 AI models via free hosted APIs. MiniMax, GLM, Kimi, DeepSeek, GPT-OSS-120B, all of them. Plugs straight into OpenClaude, OpenCode, Zed IDE, and more.
- [Full Video Ad Made with Pinterest + Kling 3.0 + Claude](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/mtvmald-ai-video-ad-workflow): mtvmald made a polished video ad without a camera or crew. Grabbed a reference image from Pinterest, recreated it with nano banana, then animated it with Kling 3.0 and Claude. Whole thing is AI, start to finish.
- [Reverse-Engineer Any Creator's Style with One Prompt](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/startupideaspod-reverse-engineer-creator-style): Startup Ideas Pod fed a 65-second video to an AI agent with one prompt: 'Break down the style, transcribe the script, and give me a replication plan.' Got back a full creative playbook.
- [DTC Ad Creatives with Claude + GPT Images](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/ikaustubhchavan-dtc-ad-creatives): Kaustubh Chavan reverse-engineers top DTC brand ads, feeds them as references to Claude for copy and GPT for visuals. Gets polished static ad creatives without a designer.
- [Full Campaign Design from One ChatGPT Prompt](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/ecomchasedimond-one-prompt-campaign): Chase Dimond typed one prompt into ChatGPT Images 2.0 and got a complete Father's Day campaign. Landing page, email, SMS, ad creative, popup. All matching, all consistent. Seconds, not days.
- [Unlimited Image Ads with Nano Banana 2](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing/alexgoughcooper-nano-banana-2-tutorial): Alex Cooper dropped a full YouTube tutorial on Nano Banana 2. Shows the exact process and prompts to generate unlimited AI image ads. 15 minutes, no fluff.
- [Stop Shipping AI on Vibes. Use Evals.](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/vibe-coding/gaelbreton-ai-evals-loop): Gael Breton spent months shipping AI 'improvements' with no way to prove they actually helped. His fix: collect real examples, run a 20-question yes/no eval, only commit if the score goes up. Simple loop, massive difference.
- [The Claude Code Creator's 8-Step Dev Workflow](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/vibe-coding/alexfinn-claude-code-workflow): Alex Finn broke down Boris Cherny's (creator of Claude Code) development workflow into 8 steps. The mental models and processes the guy who built the tool actually uses. Video walkthrough included.
- [Hermes Workspace: One Command, Full AI Environment](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/vibe-coding/juliangoldieseo-hermes-workspace-setup): Julian Goldie shows how Hermes Workspace killed the setup tax. One curl command and you get gateway, UI, models, memory, and skills. All auto-configured. Minutes, not hours.
- [Build Your Own AI Email Assistant in Claude Code](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/vibe-coding/alexhillman-andrew-chen-email-assistant): Andrew Chen posted a $150k/year problem: he wants an AI that watches his inbox, scores importance, references his knowledge base, drafts replies, and files emails. Alex Hillman retweeted saying you can build this right now in Claude Code - just describe what you want and add 'ask me clarifying questions until you know what I want to build and walk me through the setup step by step.'
- [We Got Agents Wrong](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/bentossell-agents-wrong): Ben Tossell spent 3 billion tokens in four months, all through a terminal watching an agent write code he couldn't write. He doesn't read the code but reads the agent output religiously, picking up knowledge on how code works, where things fail, and where they succeed. That's his version of learning to program. The new technical class.
- [A Beginner's Guide to Claude Code (No Coding Required)](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/vibe-coding/eda-claude-code-beginners-guide): Eda Akturk built a full packing list app with zero lines of code using Claude Code. Here's her step-by-step guide to building your first app.
- [Claude Code for Academics: The Beginner’s Guide](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/effortlessacademic-claude-code-academics): Effortless Academic breaks down how to use Claude Code to manage the messy middle of research. It maps local folders to the AI, uses /init to set project rules, and employs @ mentions to keep context tight while organizing notes and PDFs.
- [The Non-Technical Guide to Claude Code](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/general/michaelcrist-claude-code-guide): Michael Crist explains why Claude Code is an agent with hands for non-coders. The secret is moving from simple prompts to briefings (CLAUDE.md) that give the AI full context of your business rules and project goals.
- [How I Use Claude for Equity Research](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/finance-ops/michael-fritzell-claude-equity-research): Michael Fritzell systematized his equity research by turning Claude into an automated analyst. He uses Projects to run Bull/Bear cases instantly and Cowork to extract financial data from PDFs directly into formatted Excel tables.
- [My 3-Skill System for Marketing with Claude](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/marketing-ops/leadershipinchange-claude-skills-marketing): Stop paying the 'Blank Slate Tax' by using Claude Skills—markdown files that encode your brand voice and audience. This system uses three core workflows: an Email Sequence Builder, a Competitor Intelligence Brief, and an SEO Article Optimizer.
- [How to Build a Custom SEO AI Agent](https://realaiexamples.com/ai-examples/seo/marketermilk-seo-ai-agent-guide): Marketer Milk explains how to build an SEO agent by documenting your expertise into markdown 'skills'. Use Claude Projects for solo work or Gumloop for team workflows, then connect them to real-time data via MCP to automate audits and content decay tracking.
